channel.title: Personality.fyi Blog
channel.description: Honest MBTI analysis for careers, compatibility, and self-understanding. Written by Brad Kam.

item.title: MBTI Compatibility: All 136 Type Pairings
item.description: Every MBTI compatibility pairing analyzed in plain English. Scores, strengths, friction, communication tips. All 136 unique pairings.
item.author: hello@personality.fyi (Brad Kam)

item.title: Are INFJs really rare?
item.description: INFJs are approximately 1-2% of the population, making them the rarest of the 16 MBTI types. But here is what the rarity claim does and doesn't mean.
item.author: hello@personality.fyi (Brad Kam)

item.title: What is the best personality type for leadership?
item.description: ENTJs are most often cited as the best MBTI type for leadership, followed by ESTJs, ENFJs, and INTJs. Each leads differently. Here's how to tell.
item.author: hello@personality.fyi (Brad Kam)

item.title: What is the best personality type for startups?
item.description: ENTPs and ENTJs are most often cited as the best MBTI types for startup founders. INTJ, ESTP, and ENFP are also strong fits. What the wiring rewards.
item.author: hello@personality.fyi (Brad Kam)

item.title: Can your MBTI type change over time?
item.description: Core preferences are stable across adulthood, but test results can shift based on mood, life stage, and which traits you are emphasizing. Here's what changes and what doesn't.
item.author: hello@personality.fyi (Brad Kam)

item.title: Best MBTI Personality Types for Every Care
item.description: Which MBTI types thrive in which careers, with specific reasoning. 30 career guides from software engineering to medicine.
item.author: hello@personality.fyi (Brad Kam)

item.title: MBTI Type Comparisons: Side-by-Side Guides
item.description: Commonly confused MBTI type pairs compared across leadership, communication, careers, conflict, and stress response. 16 comparison guides.
item.author: hello@personality.fyi (Brad Kam)

item.title: ENFJ Free Career Planning, Best Jobs & Com
item.description: ENFJ (The Protagonist) free career planning guide: best careers, skills to develop, common career pivots, and live job listings calibrated to ENFJ.
item.author: hello@personality.fyi (Brad Kam)

item.title: ENFP Free Career Planning, Best Jobs & Com
item.description: ENFP (The Campaigner) free career planning guide: best careers, skills to develop, common career pivots, and live job listings calibrated to ENFP.
item.author: hello@personality.fyi (Brad Kam)

item.title: ENTJ Free Career Planning, Best Jobs & Com
item.description: ENTJ (The Commander) free career planning guide: best careers, skills to develop, common career pivots, and live job listings calibrated to ENTJ cognitive.
item.author: hello@personality.fyi (Brad Kam)

item.title: ENTP Free Career Planning, Best Jobs & Com
item.description: ENTP (The Debater) free career planning guide: best careers, skills to develop, common career pivots, and live job listings calibrated to ENTP cognitive.
item.author: hello@personality.fyi (Brad Kam)

item.title: ESFJ Free Career Planning, Best Jobs & Com
item.description: ESFJ (The Consul) free career planning guide: best careers, skills to develop, common career pivots, and live job listings calibrated to ESFJ cognitive.
item.author: hello@personality.fyi (Brad Kam)

item.title: ESFP Free Career Planning, Best Jobs & Com
item.description: ESFP (The Entertainer) free career planning guide: best careers, skills to develop, common career pivots, and live job listings calibrated to ESFP.
item.author: hello@personality.fyi (Brad Kam)

item.title: ESTJ Free Career Planning, Best Jobs & Com
item.description: ESTJ (The Executive) free career planning guide: best careers, skills to develop, common career pivots, and live job listings calibrated to ESTJ cognitive.
item.author: hello@personality.fyi (Brad Kam)

item.title: ESTP Free Career Planning, Best Jobs & Com
item.description: ESTP (The Entrepreneur) free career planning guide: best careers, skills to develop, common career pivots, and live job listings calibrated to ESTP.
item.author: hello@personality.fyi (Brad Kam)

item.title: How do I know if I'm an introvert or extrovert?
item.description: The test is what recharges you, not how you behave at parties. Introverts recharge alone; extroverts recharge with people. Here's how to tell for yourself.
item.author: hello@personality.fyi (Brad Kam)

item.title: INFJ Free Career Planning, Best Jobs & Com
item.description: INFJ (The Advocate) free career planning guide: best careers, skills to develop, common career pivots, and live job listings calibrated to INFJ cognitive.
item.author: hello@personality.fyi (Brad Kam)

item.title: INFP Free Career Planning, Best Jobs & Com
item.description: INFP (The Mediator) free career planning guide: best careers, skills to develop, common career pivots, and live job listings calibrated to INFP cognitive.
item.author: hello@personality.fyi (Brad Kam)

item.title: INTJ Free Career Planning, Best Jobs & Com
item.description: INTJ (The Architect) free career planning guide: best careers, skills to develop, common career pivots, and live job listings calibrated to INTJ cognitive.
item.author: hello@personality.fyi (Brad Kam)

item.title: INTP Free Career Planning, Best Jobs & Com
item.description: INTP (The Logician) free career planning guide: best careers, skills to develop, common career pivots, and live job listings calibrated to INTP cognitive.
item.author: hello@personality.fyi (Brad Kam)

item.title: ISFJ Free Career Planning, Best Jobs & Com
item.description: ISFJ (The Defender) free career planning guide: best careers, skills to develop, common career pivots, and live job listings calibrated to ISFJ cognitive.
item.author: hello@personality.fyi (Brad Kam)

item.title: ISFP Free Career Planning, Best Jobs & Com
item.description: ISFP (The Adventurer) free career planning guide: best careers, skills to develop, common career pivots, and live job listings calibrated to ISFP.
item.author: hello@personality.fyi (Brad Kam)

item.title: ISTJ Free Career Planning, Best Jobs & Com
item.description: ISTJ (The Logistician) free career planning guide: best careers, skills to develop, common career pivots, and live job listings calibrated to ISTJ.
item.author: hello@personality.fyi (Brad Kam)

item.title: ISTP Free Career Planning, Best Jobs & Com
item.description: ISTP (The Virtuoso) free career planning guide: best careers, skills to develop, common career pivots, and live job listings calibrated to ISTP cognitive.
item.author: hello@personality.fyi (Brad Kam)

item.title: What is the rarest MBTI type?
item.description: INFJ is the rarest MBTI type, at approximately 1-2% of the population. INTJ, ENTJ, and ENFJ are also uncommon. Full ranking and the why behind each.
item.author: hello@personality.fyi (Brad Kam)

item.title: What jobs do INFPs love?
item.description: INFPs thrive in roles that align with their values: writing, therapy, art, social work, and education. Here's why these fields fit and which jobs to avoid.
item.author: hello@personality.fyi (Brad Kam)

item.title: Which MBTI type is the most romantic?
item.description: INFPs and ENFPs are most often cited as the most romantic MBTI types, followed by ISFPs and INFJs. What the F-types bring that T-types don't.
item.author: hello@personality.fyi (Brad Kam)

item.title: Why do INFJs disappear from relationships?
item.description: The INFJ door slam is real, but it's not arbitrary. Here's what triggers it, what it looks like, and whether the relationship can be recovered.
item.author: hello@personality.fyi (Brad Kam)
